title: koanophyllon prinodes
side_effects: Koanophyllon prinodes can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea in some individuals due to its irritating properties. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to allergic reactions, including skin rashes, hives, and anaphylaxis. Long-term use of Koanophyllon prinodes without proper guidance can also result in liver and kidney damage, as well as an increased risk of bleeding and bruising. Furthermore, improper use of the plant may interact with other medications, exacerbating conditions such as high blood pressure, diabetes, and cardiovascular disease.
